summary: Completed E2E testing of new Wishlist feature for Addrika. All core wishlist functionality working: add/remove items, view wishlist, share wishlist via unique link, and purchase items from shared wishlist as gifts.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 404 when removing non-existent item from existing wishlist. Bug: MongoDB $set updated_at causes modified_count=1 even when $pull doesn't remove any item.

wishlist_icon_header.description: Heart icon visible in header navigation (desktop and mobile)

wishlist_button_product_card.description: Heart button visible next to 'Add to Cart' on product cards

add_to_wishlist.description: Clicking wishlist button adds item to wishlist with toast notification

features: Shows wishlist items with image, name, size, price
Add to Cart button per item

share_wishlist_modal.description: Share modal appears with recipient name, message fields, and Create Shareable Link button

features: Shows owner's name in banner: 'Test User's Wishlist'
Shows gift message: 'My favorite incense for gifting!'
Lists all wishlist items with selection checkboxes
Shows total price for selected items
Buy as Gift button navigates to checkout

buy_as_gift.description: Clicking 'Buy as Gift' adds items to cart and navigates to checkout
buy_as_gift.toast_message: 2 items added to cart as gift!

action_items: MINOR: Fix /api/wishlist/remove endpoint to check if item was actually removed before returning 200. Current bug: modified_count=1 due to $set updated_at even when $pull didn't find item.
critical_code_review_comments: Wishlist backend (routers/wishlist.py): Well-structured with proper auth checks on all endpoints except public shared wishlist
WishlistContext.jsx: Proper state management with loading states, error handling, and axios integration
WishlistPage.jsx: Good UX with share modal, item management, and Add All to Cart
SharedWishlistPage.jsx: Public page correctly fetches wishlist by share_code without auth
FragranceGrid.jsx: Wishlist button properly integrated next to Add to Cart with loading state
Header.jsx: Wishlist icon with count badge correctly positioned (both desktop and mobile)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user. Created test wishlist items (cleaned up after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wishlist feature fully tested and working. Test share code was P91S8RV- (now cleared). Login uses 'identifier' field (not 'email') - can be email or username. API auth is cookie-based using session_token.
verification_screenshots: .screenshots/wishlist_05_after_add.png - Toast notification after adding to wishlist
